brief_html: Notifies Battle.net that you have left a Diablo II game.
remarks_html:
Notifies Battle.net that you have left a Diablo II game.

Please note: This message's official name is not known, and has been invented.

comments.content_html: I've clarified that this is only used for Diablo II, other products send SID_STOPADV (if last remaining player) and SID_ENTERCHAT after leaving a game.
